synthesis_hints: Bias and execution must align with ICT-style context: liquidity, order blocks, FVGs, market structure, sessions.
Only favor setups with planned reward:risk in the 1:8–1:9 band; reject or downgrade anything below 1:8.

bullish: HTF (weekly/daily) supportive of longs — liquidity taken, structure shifting bullish, or discount reclaim per your ICT framework
bearish: HTF supportive of shorts — premium delivery, liquidity above swept, or bearish structure per your ICT framework
neutral: No clear HTF bias, mid-range chop, or conflicting W vs D — reduce risk or no new positions

risk_rules: Reward:risk: target the 1:8 to 1:9 band only; minimum acceptable planned R:R is 1:8 — do not take setups below that.
Risk per trade: cap at your chosen % or $ of account (document in journal).
Maximum 2 open positions on the same asset unless scaling a single planned idea.
Two full stop-outs in a row: done for the day.
No revenge entries after a loss in the same session.
notes: ICT-focused workflow: run tv ict / tv_ict for W·D·4H packs; align discretionary reads with bias_criteria and risk_rules. Position-tool style overlays: see examples/position-tool.pine — set SL/TP so on-chart R:R sits in 1:8–1:9 when you mark a hypothetical trade.
